message:
fix(components): improve mascot, scroll behavior, viz animations, and site state

- robot-mascot: expand mascot interaction logic
- custom-cursor: add custom cursor component
- scroll-to-top: improve scroll-to-top behavior
- search-v3-pipeline-viz: refactor pipeline visualization
- mcp-beads-integration-viz, product-bus-viz: minor animation fixes
- site-state: expand state management with new flags
- agent-flywheel, site-header: minor fixes
- Update beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

-                {[...Array(3)].map((_, i) => (
+                {Array.from({ length: 3 }).map((_, i) => (
                   <motion.div
                     key={i}
                     className="absolute inset-0 rounded-full"

+                   <animateMotion dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite" path="M 50 0 Q 80 50 85 100" />
                  </motion.circle>
                </>
